text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Marvelous Sunday talking with Nice Nature
one day after classes are finished.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, isn't this you and Mayano? The news is
talking all about how the two of you managed to
make an extinct flower bloom.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean that thing from a while back? I did
get a lot of praise for that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can downplay it all you want, but this is the
discovery of the century. You should really be
proud.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But all we did was help make something
marvelous happen. ☆ You see, it all started when
we were up on a snowy mountain...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Here comes a Kaiser snowball! ☆ Take this! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oof! Now you've done it! But I'm still airborne!
And this one's a heat-seeker! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! So cooold! ☆ All right, that's it! I'm going to make an even bigger snowball!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! ☆ Mayday! Mayday! Ahaha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Are you giving up already?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hey, Mayano! Why don't we make an igloo here?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Yeah, let's do it! Let's make it look like a
majestic castle!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: There, all done! What a marvelous igloo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's go in and—
Graaah! Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! A g-gorilla?! And it's completely
white!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What's it mad about?! We haven't even done
anything!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Rrrgh! Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It's been protecting this area by itself all this
time.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And waiting for its wish to come true—its wish
that a marvelous day will come.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! This igloo is nice and warm, and it'll
wrap you in marvelousness!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Graaah... Grrr...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it ran off.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And that's what happened! ☆ After that, a
marvelous flower bloomed, so we told everyone
about it! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold it! That can't be all! How can you
expect me to believe that story?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A mysterious white gorilla? Igloo power? Ha,
that's one tall tale... Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, isn't it just wonderful? ☆ We granted its
wish, and a miraculously marvelous thing
happened! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You'll see once we get to the marvelous flower.
Keep following me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Follow you? Uh, when did I agree to go
anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! ☆ Stay right there, you marvelous
thing, you! ★☆★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Something marvelous, huh? I wonder if my
performance will increase by a miraculous margin
if I wish for it with all my heart.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But of course! ☆ First, you have to feel the sheer marvelousness of the world! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that sounds darn near scary... Y'know
what, forget I asked. I think I'd rather stay as I
am.
